name: Big Rock Pickleball
description:
Big Rock Pickleball, LLC, is a privately owned indoor pickleball court located between Mount Vernon and Big Lake, Washington. Big Rock Pickleball’s mission is to provide the community and visitors with a tournament grade Pickleball court for recreational play and skill building clinics. In addition, Big Rock Pickleball has provided outreach to the local community and other countries around the world.
​
We offer the finest, single court, indoor pickleball facility in Northwest Washington and some very nice additions to our court making it your favorite place to play and practice.
open_play_schedule: Available to reserve daily from 6am-10pm daily.
fees: Private — $20/hour plus tax, lobbing machine available to rent as well. Private or group lessons available.

name: Big Rock Pickleball
description:
Spacious court allowing ample room for ATP and Earnies. Temperature controlled. Titan ball machine for rent. Paddles and balls available for new players. 
Owners on site.
open_play_schedule: reserve the court at bigrockpb.com  Big Rock Guest House may also be available. Two bedroom, one bath. Contact owner.
fees: Private — $20 per hour for up to eight players.  Video recorded analisis $10 per person per video, Lobster Machine $20 per hour.

name: Blackburn Pickleball Pavilion
description: Come play pickleball at Blackburn Pickleball Pavilion in Mount Vernon, WA! There are 10 indoor hard and asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like lights, restrooms, wheelchair accessibility, and water. You can’t reserve the courts.
open_play_schedule: Courts 1-3 open to public  06:00am-10:00pm Courts 4-10 reserved for Skagit Valley PC 08:00-11:00am 04:00-08:00pm

name: Clearidge Park
open_play_schedule: If courts are full and people waiting, rotate off after 11 pt game or 20 min of drilling.

name: Guemes Island Schoolhouse Park
description: Come play pickleball at Guemes Island Schoolhouse Park in Anacortes, WA! There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms. The courts are free.

name: Hillcrest Park
description: Hillcrest Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Mount Vernon, WA. There are 6 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms and water. You can’t reserve the courts.

name: Mount Erie Elementary
description: Come play pickleball at Mount Erie Elementary in Anacortes, WA! There are 3 outdoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility. The courts are free.

name: Playtime Pickleball Club
description: Playtime Pickleball Club is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Burlington, WA. There are 8 indoor concrete and acrylic courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play. Amenities include a pro shop or equipment store, restrooms, youth programming, and trainers or lessons.

name: Samish Island Park
description: Samish Island Park is a place to play pickleball in Bow, WA. There is 1 outdoor court. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The court is free.

name: Skagit Valley Family YMCA
description: Skagit Valley Family YMCA is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Mount Vernon, WA. There are 4 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. You can reserve the courts. Players have access to restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility.
hours: Monday-Friday: 5:00am-9:00pm Saturday: 7:00am-4:00pm Sunday: 12:00pm-4:00pm (members only, no drop-ins) The Aquatics Center closes 30 minutes prior to the building closing. Provided by ReClique YMCA 360 Online Access Download YMCA 360 (Google Play Store) Download YMCA 360 (Apple)

name: Skyline Beach club
description: Come play pickleball at Skyline Beach club in Anacortes, WA! There are 4 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water. Reservations are available.
